title: Google Drive credential redirect URI mismatch error
symptom: After attempting to authenticate a Google Drive credential, n8n throws a 'redirect uri mismatch' error during the OAuth callback process.
not_this_if: Running n8n on a self-hosted environment
root_cause: The redirect URI configured in the Google Cloud Console does not match the one expected by n8n during the OAuth authentication process. This mismatch prevents successful authentication and results in an error.
fix_steps: Ensure the redirect URI in Google Cloud Console matches the one provided by n8n.
Update to n8n version 2.1.4 or later if using n8n Cloud.
agent_instruction: Verify and update the redirect URI in Google Cloud Console, then authenticate again.
